query: UPDATE invoice SET invoice_date = $1, subject = $2, title = $3, header_html = $4, footer_html = $5, recipient_name = $6, recipient_first_name = $7, recipient_title = $8, recipient_form_of_address = $9, street = $10, house_number = $11, zip_code = $12, city = $13, country = $14, customer_contact_id = $15 WHERE id = $16
